title: rubus × neglectus
intro: Rubus × neglectus, also known as the Thimbleberry, is a hybrid plant species of the Rubus genus, specifically a cross between Rubus parviflorus and Rubus pubescens. The medicinal properties of Thimbleberry include its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and anthocyanins, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Thimbleberry include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against infections. Thimbleberry can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder for use in herbal remedies, and is often used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
